import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a_str = match parts.get(0) when Some(s) s when None "0" end
let b_str = match parts.get(1) when Some(s) s when None "0" end
let a = match string.parse_int(a_str) when Some(n) n when None 0 end
let b = match string.parse_int(b_str) when Some(n) n when None 0 end
let r = a * a + b * b
println("r=#{r}")
